content.body: It seems that Microsoft was having DNS problems yesterday some datacentre issue

I've given the "Minor TLS requirements revisions" PR a quick look over. There are a couple of cases where they reference RFCs that are currently only informative.  Is there a path to getting them referenced normatively?
And there was also a case where the new requirement is too restrictive.
here is the new document for review, i believe i fixed the issue with it being crazy.
other than Andrew's comments on the late TLS additions, everything is here, even the mapping for annex a
